visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with her hair in a bun wearing a light blue button-down shirt stands in a bustling outdoor market. She holds a wooden skewer topped with dark meat and bright orange sea urchin. Large white and blue text overlays appear on the left. The background shows market stall awnings and several passers-by in casual clothing. (2) The camera angle shifts to a medium close-up as the woman speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with her hands. She wears a black cross-body strap with a small blue pouch. The background is a mix of bright daylight and warm-toned shop lights under a white tarp. (3) A close-up shot features a wooden tray of four large, fresh oysters on a bed of crushed ice, garnished with a small pine sprig. The lighting is bright and natural, highlighting the glossy texture of the seafood. (4) The screen splits horizontally: both sections show women slurping large oysters from their shells. They are in the same market environment. The woman in the top half wears the blue shirt, while the woman in the bottom half wears a black top. Yellow text overlays are visible in the center. (5) Close-up shots of skewers featuring marbled wagyu beef topped with thick layers of sea urchin. Large yellow text overlays display Japanese Yen and Taiwan Dollar prices. The woman in the blue shirt is seen biting into a skewer with a look of intense enjoyment. (6) A detailed shot of eel skewers with sea urchin on a white paper plate. A wooden chopstick picks up a piece. A large red circular graphic with a white character appears briefly in the center of the frame. (7) The woman stands in front of a closed metal shutter and a wooden sign, holding a plastic cup of iced coffee topped with a swirl of white soft-serve ice cream. She makes a peace sign and smiles at the camera. The lighting is bright, overcast daylight.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 日本. [Logo]: 築地. [Slogan]: 市場. (2) [Subtitle]: 跟你們說我來東京. (3) [Subtitle]: 可能超過30次. (4) [Subtitle]: 都沒有來過. [Subtitle]: 第一次來. (5) [Subtitle]: 好像是很觀光客的地方. (6) [Subtitle]: 下次還要來嗎. (7) [Subtitle]: 沒關係唷. [Variety]: 想都不想. (8) [Subtitle]: 人真的超級多. (9) [Subtitle]: 今天禮拜一耶. (10) [Subtitle]: 如果假日還得了. (11) [Subtitle]: 真的. (12) [Subtitle]: 來看看就好. [Subtitle]: 吃吃東西就好. (13) [Subtitle]: 沒錯. [Subtitle]: 有來過就好. (14) [Slogan]: 帶大家來瞧瞧. [Subtitle]: 什麼叫做300變不見. (15) [Variety]: 好吃!!. (16) [Slogan]: 6000日幣. [Slogan]: 1400台幣. (17) [Slogan]: 2000日幣. [Slogan]: (450台幣). (18) [Variety]: (這是450元消失的過程). (19) [Subtitle]: 和牛好吃好吃. (20) [Subtitle]: 鰻魚跟海膽. [Subtitle]: 一口咬下去. (21) [Variety]: 爽. [Subtitle]: 超爽的. (22) [Subtitle]: 都很新鮮. (23) [Subtitle]: 不會有那個奇怪的味道. (24) [Subtitle]: 不用擔心. (25) [Slogan]: *一日蛋白質補充*.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main narrator, 1 female friend in split screen, 2 children in the background, and approximately 8 other passers-by or workers visible throughout the market.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with dark hair tied in a high bun, wearing a light blue long-sleeved button-down shirt and a black cross-body bag strap with a blue accessory.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between various sections of Tsukiji Market, showing food stalls with colorful awnings, seafood displays on ice, crowded walkways with pedestrians, and eventually a quieter street front with a closed grey metal shutter and a wooden traditional shop sign.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a female voice speaking in a cheerful, energetic tone over an upbeat acoustic guitar and drum BGM. Background chatter from a public market is audible. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX triggers as the speaker continues her narrative. The BGM tempo remains steady. (3) A bright 'ding' sound effect punctuates the appearance of on-screen text, following a slight shift in the speaker's vocal pitch as she expresses surprise. (4) A short, wet percussive sound (slurping) is followed immediately by the speaker saying '好吃!' (delicious) with high vocal arousal and positive valence. (5) A 'cha-ching' or cash register sound effect plays simultaneously with a transition to a new food item, accompanied by a brief swell in the BGM volume. (6) Several fast-paced 'pop' SFX and a heavy bass 'impact' SFX mark the visual appearance of graphic overlays. The vocal narration continues with high articulation clarity. (7) The BGM enters a melodic resolution phase with a final chime sound effect as the speaker concludes her sentence and the audio fades out into soft environmental city noise.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Observation -> Experience -> Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a high-energy travel experience at Tsukiji Market, highlighting the contrast between the crowded atmosphere and the high quality (and price) of the seafood and wagyu beef. The video aims to entertain and inform viewers about specific food items like uni-topped wagyu and large oysters.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal travel vlog rather than a paid advertisement, though specific market stalls are visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency editing and sound effects typical of social media vlogs to maintain viewer engagement. The focus is heavily on high-value street food.
